payload.answer: The Brain Slack agent project has transitioned from planned (status=open) to implemented at MVP stage. The prior planned status is superseded and should no longer be presented as current.
citations: Existing project state: Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open
New input: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented
payload.decision: This is a temporal status transition conflict. The existing fact (Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open) is superseded by the new fact (Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented). The old status must be retired and the new status committed as current.

entity_resolution.reason: 'Brain Slack agent' and 'Brain Slack agent MVP' refer to the same project entity. The MVP label denotes the implementation milestone. The entity should be updated in place with the new status, and the prior planned/open status retired.

payload.intent: Update the status of the Brain Slack agent project from planned/open to implemented (MVP complete)

memory_cards.statement: Brain Slack agent was previously planned with status=open. This fact is now superseded and must not be presented as current.
The Brain Slack agent MVP has been implemented.

details: New status (MVP implemented) committed as current fact
No ambiguity detected; transition is unambiguous and durable

repair_options: Retire the memory card stating Brain Slack agent status=open/planned and replace with status=implemented (MVP).
